# GitHub Actions Workflows

CI workflows are added in Phase 5.

This directory exists as a placeholder to signal intent. When Phase 5 begins, the following workflows will be added here:

- `ci.yml` — lint, test, and build on every PR
- `release.yml` — image build and GitOps tag commit on merge to main
- `dco-check.yml` — DCO sign-off enforcement on PRs
